g.text: capture pid, comm, filename → emit ProcessEvent

g.text: capture saddr, daddr, sport, dport → ConnEvent

svg.text: BPF verifier runs at load time — bounds-checks all
memory accesses, ensures no unbounded loops
run on any kernel with BTF
